ticket.missing_manage_threads: You need the Manage Threads permission to do this.

setup.name: setup
setup.description: Send the ticket dashboard message in the current channel.

errors.text_channel_only: This command can only be used in text channels.

run.success: The ticket dashboard was sent successfully!

claim.name: claim
claim.description: Claim the ticket in the current thread.

errors.already_claimed: This ticket is already claimed by {{- userMention}}.
errors.already_closed: This ticket is closed, it cannot be claimed.

close.name: close
close.description: Close the ticket in the current thread.

reopen.name: reopen
reopen.description: Reopen the ticket in the current thread.

stats.name: stats
stats.empty: No command has been used yet.

ticket_stats.name: ticketstats
ticket_stats.description: Show per-participant message counts for a ticket.
ticket_stats.option_ticket_description: Ticket to inspect (defaults to the current thread).
ticket_stats.not_found: No ticket found. Use this inside a ticket thread or pick a ticket.
ticket_stats.empty: No messages have been recorded for this ticket yet.
ticket_stats.title: Message stats — ticket #{{ticketId}}

dashboard.title: Tickets
dashboard.description: Click the button below to open a ticket.
